title: uvid.timeline
description: Compiled geometry from edit.json. basis=aroll is body only; basis=program inserts packaging media and a dialog[] chrome sequence. Optional bgm is timeline-bound audio mixed by generate video. Sparse intent stays in edit; this file is the intermediate geometry product for video/captions/otio.

version.description: Schema version. 0 = v0.1 contract frozen from edit-v0 aroll experiment.

basis.description: aroll = body only; program = packaging inserted (intro/toc/outro).

intro.description: Episode-relative intro media path when inserted; null if none.

outro.description: Episode-relative outro media path when inserted; null if none.

tocBefore.description: Source ids before which a TOC media segment was inserted.

toc.description: Episode-relative TOC media paths aligned with tocBefore.

policy.description: Compile/render defaults applied while building this timeline.

unresolved.description: check actions that did not affect geometry.

sources.description: Per-source program span summary after compile.

segments.description: Ordered playable segments on the program axis.

captions.description: Caption cues already mapped onto this timeline's program axis.

dialog.description: Program-axis dialog chrome state sequence. Empty for basis=aroll. States: idle | talk-closed | talk-open | wait-on | hidden. Packaging (intro/toc/outro) is hidden (no person). talk-closed also = wait blink-off.

media.description: Episode-relative BGM audio path (from generate bgm / any audio bed).

durationMs.description: Probed duration of the BGM media file.

startMs.description: Program-axis start of BGM window (intro end; 0 if no intro).

endMs.description: Program-axis end of BGM window (outro start; durationMs if no outro).

loop.description: Loop BGM to cover [startMs,endMs) when bed is shorter; default true.

volume.description: Linear bed volume under A-roll dialog; default 0.22.

bgm.description: Optional BGM bed bound at timeline compile. generate video mixes under program audio. null when --bgm omitted.

dir.description: Episode-relative directory of dialog state PNGs (idle/talk-closed/talk-open/wait-on).

dialogSprites.description: Dialog sprite asset set for program compose / OTIO. null when --dialog omitted.

burn.description: Whether generate video burns ASS into the product.

captionsStyle.description: ASS look + burn policy for generate video / OTIO. Bound at timeline compile.

role.description: aroll = compiled edit body; packaging roles from flags.

picture.description: still = visual.png under audio; media = source/packaging video frames; none reserved (packaging always uses media).

kind.description: av = speech+picture; video_only = hold picture without aroll audio; packaging = intro/toc/outro media slot.

beforeSourceId.description: For role=toc: insert before this source id.

captionWord.description: Word on the program axis. Final RPG typewriter captions use these; preview SRT can collapse to turn text.

words.description: Per-word program timestamps for RPG/typewriter reveal. Omitted only when source had no words.

state.description: Dialog chrome state. idle/talk-*/wait-on map to sprite PNGs; hidden = fully transparent (packaging). talk-closed doubles as wait blink-off.

dialogCue.description: One contiguous dialog chrome state on the program axis.
